title: conyza velutina
intro: Conyza velutina, also known as silverleaf or fleabane, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Conyza velutina is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its potential benefits.
